characters.name: Tom Kitten
characters.description: A plump tabby kitten, the only boy. Wears a blue suit with brass buttons that is too tight. Mischievous and energetic.
characters.source: Tom Kitten from Beatrix Potter's The Tale of Tom Kitten (1907)

characters.name: Mittens
characters.description: A grey-and-white kitten, one of Tom's sisters. Wears a white pinafore and mittens. Giggly and playful.
characters.source: Mittens from Beatrix Potter's The Tale of Tom Kitten

characters.name: Moppet
characters.description: A tabby kitten, one of Tom's sisters. Wears a pink pinafore. The youngest-looking of the three.
characters.source: Moppet from Beatrix Potter's The Tale of Tom Kitten

characters.name: Mrs. Tabitha Twitchit
characters.description: Mother cat. Large, wears a pink/purple dress and white apron. Fussy, proper, concerned with appearances.
characters.source: Mrs. Tabitha Twitchit from Beatrix Potter's The Tale of Tom Kitten

characters.name: The Puddle-Ducks
characters.description: Three white ducks: Mr. Drake Puddle-Duck, Jemima, and Rebeccah. They walk past the garden wall and take the kittens' dropped clothes.
characters.source: The Puddle-Ducks from Beatrix Potter's The Tale of Tom Kitten

locations.name: The House
locations.description: Mrs. Tabitha Twitchit's cottage interior. Bedroom with chest of drawers, stairs, front door. Warm and tidy.

locations.name: The Garden
locations.description: A cottage garden with a stone wall, flower beds, a garden path, roses and foxgloves. The wall overlooks a country lane.

locations.name: The Lane
locations.description: A country road outside the garden wall where the Puddle-Ducks walk past.

locations.name: The Pond
locations.description: A farm pond with lily pads where the ducks swim. The borrowed clothes fall off in the water.

pages.english_text: There were three little kittens: Mittens, Tom Kitten, and Moppet.
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_004.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha indoors with her three kittens. The kittens are small and playful, gathered near the stairs. Warm domestic interior.

pages.english_text: One day their mother wanted to have a tea party.
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_005.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha scrubbing Moppet's face with a cloth. A washbowl nearby. She is getting the kittens ready. Other kittens wait in the background.

pages.english_text: She washed the kittens and brushed their fur.
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_006.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha brushing a kitten's fur on a chair. Another kitten watches. The mother is thorough and determined.

pages.english_text: She combed their tails and whiskers.
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_007.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha combing Tom Kitten's tail and whiskers while Tom stands on a chair. The other kittens watch.

pages.english_text: She dressed Tom in a blue suit. But Tom was very fat!
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_009.jpg] Tom Kitten standing in his tight blue suit, looking uncomfortable. Buttons are popping off. Mother stands behind him looking worried. A button and thread on the floor.

pages.english_text: Several buttons popped off. Mother sewed them back on.
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_008.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha getting elegant clothes out of a chest of drawers to dress Tom. Tom stands watching. The sisters peek from the window seat.

pages.english_text: "Now go into the garden. Keep your clothes clean!" said Mother.
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_010.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha sending the three dressed-up kittens out the garden door. Roses and flowers around the doorway. The kittens are all dressed in their fine clothes — Tom in blue, the girls in white pinafores.

pages.english_text: Moppet and Mittens walked down the path. They tripped on their dresses!
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_011.jpg] Moppet and Mittens walking unsteadily down the garden path in their pinafores. They look clumsy and uncomfortable in the fancy clothes. Flowers alongside the path.

pages.english_text: They fell in the garden and got dirty.
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_012.jpg] The kittens tumbling and playing in the garden, their pinafores turned around and getting dirty. Butterflies, flowers, and ferns around them.

pages.english_text: Tom climbed up the wall. His hat fell off! His buttons burst!
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_013.jpg] Tom Kitten climbing among ferns on the garden wall, his hat falling off his head, buttons popping from his blue suit. He looks wild and happy.

pages.english_text: Moppet and Mittens tried to help Tom. But all his clothes fell off!
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_014.jpg] Moppet and Mittens pulling at Tom's clothes, trying to put him back together on the garden wall. His suit is coming apart. Comedy of effort.

pages.english_text: Then three ducks came down the road. Pit pat paddle pat!
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_015.jpg] The three kittens sitting on the garden wall looking down. Three white Puddle-Ducks walking along the road below through a gate. The ducks look curious.

pages.english_text: The ducks picked up Tom's hat and clothes!
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_017.jpg] Two ducks picking up Tom's hat and tucker from the ground near the wall. The kittens peek down from above, watching. Clothes scattered on the path.

pages.english_text: The kittens laughed! Mittens fell off the wall!
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_018.jpg] The kittens on the wall with ducks below. Clothes on the ground between them. Mittens is laughing so hard she nearly falls. The ducks look pompous.

pages.english_text: Mr. Drake put on Tom's blue suit. It did not fit!
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_020.jpg] Mr. Drake Puddle-Duck wearing Tom Kitten's blue suit, which fits him very badly. He looks ridiculous but proud. The clothes are bursting at the seams on a duck.

pages.english_text: The ducks walked away in the kittens' clothes.
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_021.jpg] All three ducks waddling up the road wearing the kittens' clothes — hats, pinafores, blue suit. Chickens in the farmyard stare. Very funny sight.

pages.english_text: Then Mother came into the garden. The kittens had no clothes on!
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_022.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha coming around the garden corner and seeing her three kittens sitting naked on the wall. She looks horrified. The kittens look guilty.

pages.english_text: Mother was very angry. She smacked the kittens!
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_023.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha pulling the kittens off the wall and smacking them. She is furious. The kittens look sorry. Garden flowers around them.

pages.english_text: She sent them to bed. But the kittens did not stay in bed!
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_025.jpg] The three kittens NOT in bed — they are climbing the bed curtains, jumping on the bed, throwing clothes around. Total chaos in the bedroom. Messy, funny.

pages.english_text: And the ducks' clothes fell off in the pond!
pages.scene_description: [IMAGE: image_027.jpg] The three Puddle-Ducks swimming in a pond with lily pads. The kitten clothes are falling off and floating in the water. The ducks look unconcerned. A peaceful, funny ending.
